allergen_policy.compliance: UK Food Information Regulations 2014; Natasha's Law (PPDS, 2021); FSA Allergen Guidance May 2026.
allergen_policy.kitchen_disclaimer: Our kitchen handles all 14 regulated allergens including cereals containing gluten, crustaceans, eggs, fish, peanuts, soybeans, milk, nuts, celery, mustard, sesame, sulphur dioxide, lupin and molluscs. Cross-contact cannot be guaranteed.
allergen_policy.request_protocol: Full allergen matrix available on request at the counter or by emailing theweir@whalesborough.co.uk. Please declare any allergy at the time of booking and on arrival.

menus.name: Breakfast
menus.tagline: Eggs from down the lane. Sausages from up the hill.

items.name: Traditional English Breakfast
items.description: Two rashers Cornish smoked bacon, Marhamchurch sausage, hog's pudding, field mushroom, grilled tomato, two hash browns, baked beans and two free-range fried or poached eggs. White or granary toast.

items.name: Small English Breakfast
items.description: One rasher Cornish smoked bacon, Marhamchurch sausage, hash brown, baked beans and one free-range fried or poached egg. White or granary toast.

items.name: Vegetarian Breakfast
items.description: Two vegetarian sausages, field mushroom, grilled tomato, two hash browns, baked beans and two free-range fried or poached eggs. White or granary toast.

items.name: Vegan Breakfast
items.description: Two vegetarian sausages, field mushroom, grilled tomato, two hash browns, baked beans and scrambled tofu. White or granary toast.

items.name: Eggs Royale
items.description: Cornish smoked salmon, free-range poached eggs and hollandaise on a toasted English muffin. Add smashed avocado for £1.50.

items.name: Cornish Smoked Bacon Sandwich
items.description: Three rashers of Cornish smoked bacon in a buttered roll or between white or granary toast.

items.name: Marhamchurch Sausage Sandwich
items.description: Free-range Cornish pork sausages from Snout & Trotter in Marhamchurch. Buttered roll or between white or granary toast.

items.name: Homemade Granola
items.description: Seasonal fruit, Whalesborough honey and Trewithen Dairy natural yoghurt.

items.name: Overnight Oats
items.description: Rolled oats soaked overnight in Trewithen Dairy milk, finished with seasonal compote and seeds. See specials board for today's compote.

items.name: One Slice of Toast
items.description: White or granary with Cornish butter.

items.name: Two Slices of Toast
items.description: White or granary with Cornish butter and a choice of preserve.

items.name: Baked Beans on Toast
items.description: Baked beans on white or granary toast.

items.name: Hot Cross Bun
items.description: Toasted, with Cornish butter. Add Whalesborough honey or homemade jam for 90p. Available through the Easter season.

notes: Substitutions on cooked breakfast plates are not offered. Add-ons welcome.

menus.name: Lunch
menus.tagline: Lakeside, on the terrace, by the log fire.

items.name: Soup of the Day
items.description: Made each morning from what's ripe at Neetfield Market Garden. Served with a warm savoury scone or crusty bread.

items.name: Antipasti to Share
items.description: Cured Cornish meats, three Whalesborough cheeses (Smuggler, Miss Muffet, Nanny Muffet), charred vegetables, olives, cornichons, rocket, basil oil, grissini and bread. Serves two.

items.name: Whalesborough Ploughman's Sandwich
items.description: Smuggler cheese, Cornish ham, homemade chutney and pickled onion on granary. Served with salad and crisps.

items.name: Smoked Mackerel Jacket
items.description: Baked jacket potato, Tregida smoked mackerel, horseradish cream and rocket.

items.name: Whalesborough Cheese Panini
items.description: Miss Muffet, Cornish chutney and red onion on a pressed ciabatta. Salad and crisps.

items.name: Warren's 6oz Steak Burger
items.description: Phillip Warren beef in a brioche bun. Cornish cheddar, smoked bacon, gem lettuce, pickle, burger sauce. Chunky chips and homemade coleslaw.

items.name: Moving Mountains Plant Burger
items.description: Plant-based patty, vegan cheddar, gherkin, rocket, vegan mayo, chunky chips and vegan coleslaw.

items.name: Fish and Chips
items.description: Crispy beer-battered fish of the day, chunky chips, homemade pea purée and tartare sauce.

items.name: Whalesborough Macaroni Cheese
items.description: Cornish Smuggler and cheddar, baked golden, with garlic bread and salad. Add smoked bacon for £1.75.

items.name: Cornish Baked Ham
items.description: Two free-range eggs and chunky chips.

items.name: Goats' Cheese Tart
items.description: Caramelised red onion, Whalesborough Nanny Muffet goats' cheese, side salad and balsamic dressing.

items.name: Weir Country Salad
items.description: Mixed leaves, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, pickles, homemade coleslaw, crusty bread and Cornish butter.

items.name: Superfood Salad
items.description: Quinoa, edamame, toasted nuts and seeds, pomegranate, mixed leaves, toasted crostini and basil oil.

items.name: Cornish Cream Tea
items.description: Two homemade scones, Trewithen Dairy clotted cream, strawberry jam and a pot of tea. Served until 16:30.

modifiers.name: Add smoked bacon to mac cheese

menus.name: Sample Set Menu and Specials
menus.available: Updated every Monday. Sample set menu shown for guidance.

items.name: Farmer Dan's Lamb Sausage and Cornish Cheddar Mash
items.description: Whalesborough lamb sausage from Land Meets Sea, Cornish cheddar mash, red onion gravy.

items.name: Chimichurri Chicken, Chorizo and Pepper Skewer
items.description: Charred over the parilla, served with chunky chips, salad and homemade coleslaw.

items.name: Harissa Baked Salmon
items.description: Celtic Fish & Game salmon, charred vegetables, chorizo, sautéed potatoes, avocado, pea and mint purée.

items.name: Superfood Bowl
items.description: Grilled vegetables, quinoa, edamame, toasted nuts and seeds, pomegranate, crostini, basil oil and balsamic.

items.name: Macaroni Cheese
items.description: Cornish cheddar and Smuggler, baked golden, garlic bread and salad. Add smoked bacon for £1.75.

items.name: Goats' Cheese and Caramelised Onion Tart
items.description: Whalesborough Nanny Muffet, walnut crumb, dressed leaves, balsamic.

items.name: Moving Mountains Plant Burger
items.description: Vegan cheddar, gherkin, rocket, vegan mayo, chunky chips and vegan coleslaw.

items.name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
items.description: Whalesborough honey caramel, Trewithen Dairy clotted cream.

items.name: Whalesborough Cheeseboard
items.description: Three Whalesborough cheeses (Smuggler, Miss Muffet, Nanny Muffet), homemade chutney, oatcakes, grapes.

notes: Specials change weekly based on what is ready at Neetfield Market Garden, what Hoof to Block has cut this week, and what is landing at Celtic Fish & Game.
Dinner service runs summer Fridays and Saturdays only. Pre-book by phone or through the app from launch.

menus.name: Drinks
menus.tagline: Cornish coffee, Cornish cider, Cornish wine list.
menus.available: Served all day during opening hours.

items.name: Americano
items.description: Cornish Coffee Company, hand-roasted single origin.

items.name: Latte
items.description: Trewithen Dairy milk. Oat or soya available at no extra cost.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: Double espresso, steamed milk, chocolate dust.

items.name: Flat White
items.description: Double ristretto, microfoam.

items.name: Mocha
items.description: Espresso, Cornish chocolate, steamed milk.

items.name: Pot of English Breakfast Tea
items.description: Loose-leaf, refillable.

items.name: Herbal Infusion
items.description: Peppermint, chamomile, lemon and ginger, earl grey or green.

items.name: Hot Chocolate
items.description: Cornish chocolate, Trewithen Dairy milk. Add whipped cream and marshmallows for 30p.

items.name: J2O
items.description: Orange and Passion Fruit, Apple and Mango, or Apple and Raspberry.

items.name: Korev Lager
items.description: Cornish lager, 4.2%, 500ml bottle.

items.name: Budweiser
items.description: 4.8%, 330ml bottle.

items.name: San Miguel 0.0%
items.description: Alcohol-free, 330ml.

items.name: Cornish Orchards Cider
items.description: Range subject to availability. Ask your server.

items.name: Add a mixer (Coca-Cola, lemonade or Folkington's tonic)
Wine List by Olivers North Coast Wines
items.description: Bude-based merchant Olivers North Coast Wines curates the list. Cornish bottles alongside small-grower bottles from France, Italy, Spain and the Southern Hemisphere. Ask for the printed list or open the wine card in the app.

menus.name: Kids
menus.available: All-day. Includes a juice or milk.

items.name: Chicken Goujons and Fries
items.description: Free-range chicken goujons, fries and a choice of baked beans, peas or salad.

items.name: Vegetable Nuggets and Fries
items.description: Crispy vegetable nuggets, fries and a choice of baked beans, peas or salad.

items.name: Beef Burger and Fries
items.description: Phillip Warren mini beef burger in a brioche bun, fries and a choice of baked beans, peas or salad.

items.name: Fish Fingers and Fries
items.description: Cornish fish fingers, fries and a choice of baked beans, peas or salad.

items.name: Macaroni Cheese
items.description: Cornish cheddar macaroni, salad garnish, garlic bread.

items.name: Mini Sunday Roast
items.description: Sundays only. A small portion of the grown-up roast: meat of the day, roast potatoes, seasonal vegetables, gravy.

items.name: Fruit Shoot
items.description: Apple and blackcurrant, orange or summer fruits.

items.name: Crusha Flavoured Milk
items.description: Chocolate, strawberry or banana. Add whipped cream for 30p.

items.name: Cawston Press Fruit Water
items.description: Apple and pear, or apple and summer berries.

notes: High chairs and child seats available at no charge.
Smaller portions of selected adult dishes available on request — ask your server.

menus.name: For the Dogs
menus.tagline: Three things on the menu for the dog who came in with you.
menus.available: Served any time the kitchen is open.
menus.policy: Dogs are welcome inside the restaurant and out on the terrace. Water bowls at the door.

items.name: Plain Sausage
items.description: One Snout & Trotter pork sausage, plain, cooled, sliced.

items.name: Whalesborough Dog Biscuit
items.description: Oat and apple biscuit, baked in the Whalesborough kitchen. Wheat-free.

items.name: Puppuccino
items.description: Small cup of whipped cream. Lactose-free option available.

notes: Dogs must stay on a lead inside the restaurant.
Please let your server know if your dog has any allergies before treating them.
